vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Lightweight Al 7075 hollow tube with cable conduit
Compatible with 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm

generated_parts.label: Cable Management Spine
generated_parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

requirements: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic
replaceable_module_path good: Battery, sensor, actuator, cartridge, payload, cable, or joint modules remain removable without full teardown.
cable_harness_visibility good: Harnesses, tubes, or service channels are routed through visible raceways or protected channels.
access_not_just_text good: Access is represented by geometry: hatch, pocket, channel, fastener pattern, slot, window, or removable cover.

harness_strain_relief_and_bend_radius good: Every cable exit shows strain relief geometry (clamp, grommet, tie point) and routing respects a stated minimum bend radius away from moving joints and sharp edges.
connector_accessibility_and_keying good: Connectors are reachable without disassembling structure, have finger/tool clearance, and mention keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating.
axis_datum_readability good: J1-J6 axis rings, reducer/bearing dummies, encoder covers, and tool flange datum are visible.
cable_spine_serviceability good: Cable spine clips externally or remains inspectable through open channels.
joint_cartridge_replaceability good: Joint cartridges can be removed without cutting printed links.
bearing_shaft_mounting_sanity good: Each joint shows a bearing seat with shoulder or retaining feature, shaft locating geometry, and stated fit intent for inner/outer races.

verify.rule: Schema must include all mandatory keys

verify.value: All part origins traceable to P0 datum
verify.rule: Each part must have a clear geometric relationship to the assembly's primary datum
Interface types, DOF, and clearance must be consistent with neighboring subsystems

verify.value: All critical joints show locking features
verify.rule: Joints subject to vibration or load must have visible locking mechanisms

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: External cable carrier from base to wrist
physics_paths: Signal and power flow (electrical)
Pneumatic line routing
Strain relief at each joint for cable protection
integration_opportunities: Potential for integrated strain relief within joint modules.
Consider flexible conduit options for improved bend radius.

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary datum on J1 connector interface

verification_focus: Cable routing clearance and bend radius at joints.

risk.mit: Review encoder specifications and adjust pocket depth accordingly.

risk.mit: Perform FEA analysis and iterate on design.
